description: Raw 18S rRNA metabarcoding reads from the ASTAN observatory (SOMLIT-Astan station, Western English Channel), published by Caracciolo et al. (2022, Molecular Ecology, doi:10.1111/mec.16539). Used as input to the MARCO-BOLO Data Analysis Challenge.
name: 18S protist metabarcoding from the ASTAN observatory (raw reads)
